componentScope.label: sentiment analysis
componentScope.guidance: Document the sentiment-analysis subsystem inside the skincare-analysis project ONLY — model, preprocessing, scoring, output schema, and any pipeline/script that produces sentiment labels or scores. Treat the rest of the project (unrelated NLP tasks, scraping, ETL, dashboards) as out-of-scope unless directly feeding sentiment input or consuming its output. Locate the component by searching for: 'sentiment', 'polarity', 'classifier', 'classification', 'positive', 'negative', 'neutral', 'label', 'score', 'transformers', 'sklearn', 'tensorflow', 'torch', 'huggingface', 'AutoModel', 'pipeline', 'opinion', 'review', 'aspect'. Likely homes: a sentiment.py / sentiment_*.py file, a notebook, a service module, or a scripts/ entry. Confirm location and trace the full flow (input source → preprocessing → model inference → output destination) before scoping the page.

emphasis: the sentiment model (provider, model id, language, output labels/scores)
input source (where review text comes from — DB table, S3, file, scraped feed)
preprocessing steps (cleaning, tokenization, language detection, segmentation)
inference flow (batch vs streaming, batch size, GPU/CPU)
output schema (labels, scores, confidence, per-aspect vs per-document)
where output is stored (DB table/column, file, S3, downstream service)
any caching, batching, or rate-limit handling around model API calls
schema-evidence pairs the validator can resolve to file:line
skip: unrelated NLP or analytics tasks in the same repo
scraping/ETL code unless it directly produces sentiment input
dashboards or reporting code that only consumes sentiment output (mention as downstream, don't document)

pages.purpose: Single agent-docs entry documenting the sentiment-analysis subsystem inside skincare-analysis. Frontmatter-only, conformant to docs/AGENT_DOCS_SCHEMA.md v0.2.

references.note: agent-docs schema v0.2 produces frontmatter-only data files in src/content/agent-docs/. No body, no layout, no title. Calibrate against ingredient-embeddings.mdx (most recent component-scoped pilot, also an NLP service). A bespoke page already exists at src/pages/project1/sentiment.astro — Phase 4 will wire agentDocsSlug='sentiment-analysis' into it.
